creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm still trying to build devel/llvm60 on my powerpcspe machine, and hitting this issue.  I know for a fact that this built just fine back in December, with binutils 2.30 then.  However, rolling back devel/binutils, then also lang/gcc8, to December known-good, it still fails.  So, it appears something changed in base between December and February, that started triggering this assert.
